evidence: "Great who-dunnit, fairly good acting, story seems to shut-down and reopen over and over again."
"Fun to watch and safe for most families. A twist from the usual so it was full of surprises."
"the story seems to shut-down and reopen over and over again."
"It has all the story plots for each viewer - humor, mystery, love, good/evil, and a small twist at the end."
"I felt like it was for those that never saw the Wrath of Khan, and I did."
"I would have given this five stars but I was expecting a companion DVD with it for those rare moments when Blu-ray wasn't available."
"Unique, mystery, great acting talent, superb ending, family viewing perfect!"
"The power of God's word and what if it were rare."
"A twist from the usual so it was full of surprises."
"Great ending too. I give it a 10 so unless you hate fairy tales or long movies, a MUST HAVE!"

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly mystery and family-oriented content, often appreciating twists and engaging narratives. They show a strong preference for emotional resonance and sensory experiences, while their loyalty to specific creators is less evident.
